footer: ResearchThis Portal · owner: {owner} · data sourced from a curated monitoring file (§3 data contract)

theme_toggle_aria: Toggle between light and dark mode
zotero_unconfigured: Zotero isn't connected — set ZOTERO_LIBRARY_ID and ZOTERO_API_KEY to see your library here.

zotero_no_matches: Nothing in the library matches this search.
zotero_counts: Showing {shown} of {total} in the Zotero library · {inFeed} match the findings feed
chat_placeholder: Ask about a finding, author, or topic…
chat_welcome: Ask something about the findings — e.g. "what do you have on AI code review?"
chat_error: Couldn't get an answer right now. Try again shortly.
chat_unconfigured: Chat isn't set up yet — OPENAI_API_KEY is missing on the server.

reels_no_summary: No summary written for this one yet.
